lessons.action: pause discretionary builds; place pumps and tanks until stored_water >= (D+2)*2.13*P before advancing
lessons.outcome: prevents first-drought thirst spiral by making tank water the survival gate

lessons.action: treat the bridge error as a hard constraint; retry with an implemented tool or defer that command until /act supports it
lessons.outcome: keeps malformed or unsupported commands from wasting turns
